text: [Australian accent] G'day and welcome to ParkSyde's Bright Side bulletin. I'm Alex Mercer.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] And I'm Jamie Chen, bringing you the positive news that actually matters. Today we're seeing some incredible wins for our planet and our communities.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Today on The Bright Side, we've got ocean conservation hitting a major milestone, breakthrough science from the human brain, and playoffs kicking off in the NBA. Plus Sam's got Queensland's autumn weather looking absolutely mint.
